sql: SELECT id, name, status FROM users ORDER BY CASE WHEN #{role} = 'admin' THEN created_at DESC WHEN #{role} = 'user' THEN name ASC ELSE id ASC END
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, status FROM users
<choose>
    <when test="role == 'admin'">
        ORDER BY created_at DESC
    </when>
    <when test="role == 'user'">
        ORDER BY name ASC
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        ORDER BY id ASC
    </otherwise>
</choose>
